column6:
- special prox-filter to not block their W37-0 cards w/ facility code 76

# Only selecting 20 BID bits to not interfere with existing W37-0 w/ FC 76
# This filters W37-1 BID from 100,000 to 1,048,575
BS_SET, FILTER , BS_FILTER_LF
BS_AUG, FILTER , BS_FILTER_FUNC_ME
BS_SET, NUM_BITS , 37
BS_FILTER_MASK, 0 , 0x00
BS_FILTER_MASK, 1 , 0x00
BS_FILTER_MASK, 2 , 0x1F
BS_FILTER_MASK, 3 , 0xFF
BS_FILTER_MASK, 4 , 0xFE

BS_FILTER_VALUE, 0 , 0x00
BS_FILTER_VALUE, 1 , 0x00
BS_FILTER_VALUE, 2 , 0x03
BS_FILTER_VALUE, 3 , 0x0D
BS_FILTER_VALUE, 4 , 0x40
